scripts.title: DocuSignSendTemplate
scripts.code:
<?php

$config = $data['_parent']['config'];
// Parameters
$templateId = mustache($config['templateId'], $data);
$waitCompleted = getValue($config, 'waitCompleted', false);
$configRoles = getValue($config, 'templateRoles', []);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Set Recipient Information
$templateRoles = [];
foreach ($configRoles as $role) {
    switch ($role['type']) {
        case 'user':
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($role['selectedRecipientId']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'userId':
            $user = evaluateUserIdExpression($role['userIdExpression'], $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user['email'],
                'name' => $user['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'requester':
            $request = $api->processRequests()->getProcessRequestById($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($request->getUserId());
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'manager':
            $manager = getProcessManager($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $manager['email'],
                'name' => $manager['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'email':
            $expressions = [
                $role['email'],
                $role['name'],
            ];
            $mustacheEvaluatedData = evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['email']],
                'name' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['name']],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
    }
}

// Access information
$appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
if ($accessToken === null) {
    $accessToken = getGlobalAccessToken();
}
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

$body = [
    'templateId' => $templateId,
    'templateRoles' => $templateRoles,
    'status' => 'sent',
];

// Add event callback
if ($waitCompleted) {
    $requestId = $data['_request']['id'];
    $key = md5("pm4{$requestId}docusign");
    $callbackUrl = "{$appUrl}/docusign/event/{$key}/{$requestId}";
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => $callbackUrl,
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
} else {
    $callbackUrl = null;
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response, 'callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
} else {
    return ['callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}

function getGlobalAccessToken()
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/check-token",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return $response ? json_decode($response)->token : null;
}

function getProcessManager($requestId)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/process_manager/{$requestId}",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateUserIdExpression($userIdExpression, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expression' => $userIdExpression,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/user_by_expression",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expressions' => $expressions,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/evaluate_mustache_expressions",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

scripts.title: DocuSignCustomEnvelope
scripts.code:
<?php

// Parameters
$emailSubject = mustache($config['emailSubject'], $data);
$content = mustache($config['content'], $data);
$documentName = mustache($config['documentName'], $data);
$signalId = mustache($config['signalId'], $data);
$recipients = getValue($data, $config['recipients']);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Access information
$apiUrl = getenv('API_HOST');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

// Verify $recipients
if (is_array($recipients)) {
    foreach ($recipients as $index => $recipient) {
        if (empty($recipient['recipientId'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['recipientId'] = $index + 1;
        }
        if (empty($recipient['routingOrder'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['routingOrder'] = $index + 1;
        }
    }
} else {
    throw new Exception('Invalid recipients');
}

$body = [
    'emailSubject' => $emailSubject,
    'documents' => [
        [
            'documentBase64' => base64_encode($content),
            'name' => $documentName,
            'fileExtension' => 'html',
            'documentId' => '1',
        ],
    ],
    'recipients' => [
        'signers' => $recipients,
    ],
    'status' => 'sent',
];
if ($signalId) {
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => "{$apiUrl}/docusign/event/{$signalId}",
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response];
} else {
    return [];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}

scripts.title: SG - Close Surveys
scripts.code:
<?php 
/*  
 *  Welcome to ProcessMaker 4 Script Editor 
 *  To access Environment Variables use getenv("ENV_VAR_NAME") 
 *  To access Request Data use $data 
 *  To access Configuration Data use $config 
 *  To preview your script, click the Run button using the provided input and config data 
 *  Return an array and it will be merged with the processes data 
 *  Example API to retrieve user email by their ID $api->users()->getUserById(1)['email'] 
 *  API Documentation https://github.com/ProcessMaker/docker-executor-php/tree/master/docs/sdk 
 */
/* Init Guzzle (use endpoint) and set options */
/* Main variables setup*/
/* Variables to use API Calls*/
$guzzleClient = new \GuzzleHttp\Client([
    "base_uri" => $_SERVER["APP_URL"],
    "verify" => false,
]);
$guzzleOptions["headers"]["Accept"] = "application/json";
$guzzleOptions["headers"]["Authorization"] = "Bearer " . getenv("API_TOKEN");

/* Process ID definition */
//$processId = 184;
$processId = $data["_request"]["process_id"];

/* Get survey definitions and executions, process screen field is needed. */

$guzzleApi = '/api/1.0/requests?include=data&pmql=process_id=' . $processId . ' and ((data.process="Generate" and status="COMPLETED") or (data.process="Execute" and status="ACTIVE"))';

try {
    $res = $guzzleClient->request("GET", $guzzleApi, $guzzleOptions);
    $dataResult = json_decode($res->getBody(), true)["data"];
} catch (\Throwable $th) {
    return [
        'error' => [
            'code' => $th->getCode(),
            'message' => $th->getMessage()
        ]
    ];
}

/* Get expiration date from Survey definitions */

foreach($dataResult as $item) {
    if($item["data"]["process"] == "Generate") {
        $surveys[$item["data"]["uuid"]] = $item["data"]["expirationDate"];
    }
}

/* Loop Survey executions with date expired */

foreach($dataResult as $activeSurvey) {
    if($activeSurvey["data"]["process"] == "Execute") {
        $expirationDate = $surveys[$activeSurvey["data"]["uuid"]];
        $now = date("Y-m-d");

        if($now > $expirationDate) {
            $apiTaskRequest = "/api/1.0/tasks?pmql=process_request_id=" . $activeSurvey["id"] . ' and status="ACTIVE"';

            /* We get the active tasks in each of the requests*/

            try {
                $res2 = $guzzleClient->request("GET", $apiTaskRequest, $guzzleOptions);
                $tasks = json_decode($res2->getBody(), true)["data"];
            } catch (\Throwable $th) {
                return [
                    'error' => [
                        'code' => $th->getCode(),
                        'message' => $th->getMessage()
                    ]
                ];
            }

            /* Start update through API call*/ 

            foreach($tasks as $task) {
                $apiTaskUpdate           = "/api/1.0/tasks/" . $task["id"];
                $body["status"]          = "COMPLETED";
                $body["data"]["expired"] = true;
                $guzzleOptions["json"]   = $body;

                try {
                    $res3 = $guzzleClient->request("PUT", $apiTaskUpdate, $guzzleOptions);
                    //$dataResult3 = json_decode($res3->getBody(), true)["data"];
                } catch (\Throwable $th) {
                    return [
                        'error' => [
                            'code' => $th->getCode(),
                            'message' => $th->getMessage()
                        ]
                    ];
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
